title: The Great Gambler
subTitle: Jay, an expert in gambling, works for a criminal unaware that he is being used to gain military secrets. When the police discover this, they assign Inspector Vijay, Jay's lookalike, to stop him.

title: Alag: He Is Different ... He Is Alone ...
subTitle: Tejas, an odd boy who grew up in a basement, is moved to a rehabilitation centre after his father's death. When he starts displaying psychic powers, a scientist abducts him for experimentation.

title: Kuchh Meetha Ho Jaye
subTitle: A group of passengers whose flight is delayed due to a technical error are left to wait indefinitely. In that time, they get the chance to interact with each other and sort out their issues.

title: Neel Kamal
subTitle: Sita's sleepwalking turns out to be a cause of concern to her husband and family. When they investigate, they realize that her current behaviour is linked to her previous life.

title: Anita
subTitle: When Anita commits suicide, Neeraj suspects foul play and decides to investigate the truth. However, things take a turn when he starts seeing Anita everywhere.

title: Hum Hain Rahi Pyar Ke
subTitle: Rahul looks after his spoilt nephews, Sunny and Vicky, and niece, Munni. When they go to a funfair, they meet Vyjayanti, who has run away from home, and decide to shelter her without Rahul's consent.

title: Souten
subTitle: Shyam, a middle-class man, falls in love with a millionaire's daughter and marries her. However, as their relationship starts deteriorating, Shyam finds solace in the company of Radha.

title: Toh Baat Pakki!
subTitle: Rajeshwari considers Rahul to be a perfect match for her sister, Nisha, and invites him to be their tenant. However, she rejects Rahul immediately after she meets Yuvraj, a better match.

title: Charanon Ki Saugandh
subTitle: After returning to his village, Ravi learns that the local farmers are being oppressed by a despotic landlord. Soon, he decides to contest the panchayat elections against the tyrant and put an end to his cruel rule.

title: Gupt
subTitle: After his stepfather is murdered, Sahil gets arrested, but he manages to escape prison to prove his innocence. However, Inspector Udham Singh sets off to capture him.

title: Guns of Banaras
subTitle: When a young man sets out to look for his stolen bicycle, he finds himself entwined in a dangerous world of drugs and crime.

title: Guns of Banaras
subTitle: When a young man sets out to look for his stolen bicycle, he finds himself entwined in a dangerous world of drugs and crime.

title: Mera Damad
subTitle: Jai's father asks him to meet Sunita before getting married to her. However, complications arise when Jai falls in love with Kimi, while on his way to Sunita's village.

title: S.P. Chauhan
subTitle: Satpal Chauhan, a social worker from Haryana, works for women empowerment and also strives to create an alcohol-free society. However, while pursuing his goals, he faces several hardships.

title: Pathar Ke Insan
subTitle: Talented sisters, Sita and Lata, are renowned performing artists. However, the rivalry between them leads to a competition with far-reaching consequences.

title: Ustadi Ustad Se
subTitle: A flood separates childhood friends Seema and Rajesh. Years later, when she reconciles with him and the two plan to get together, things go awry with the arrival of a mysterious woman.

title: Namak Halaal
subTitle: Arjun, a youngster, works at a hotel owned by Raja and serves him faithfully. However, when he learns about a plot to kill Raja, he decides to save him from harm at any cost.

title: Aap Beati
subTitle: Geeta and her father undergo several hardships to ensure that Prakash gets an education abroad. However, things take a turn when, upon his return, he marries a rich girl.

title: Pyar Ki Jeet
subTitle: Anand visits his father's friend, Rehman, who is a doctor in a village. Soon, Anand falls in love with Soni, a simple village girl who is ostracised by society.

title: Gair Kaanooni
subTitle: Police Inspector Kapil Khanna realises that his baby boy has been switched with a girl child by the hospital and files a lawsuit against the owner, Robert Decosta while trying to find his missing son.

title: Deewaar: Let's Bring Our Heroes Home
subTitle: Haunted by the past, Vijay turns to crime, while Ravi, his younger brother, becomes an honest police officer. Fate pits them against each other when Ravi is sent to nab Vijay.

title: Trishul
subTitle: Born out of wedlock, Vijay grows up with deep resentment towards his biological father Raj, a wealthy industrialist who has been leading a comfortable life with his legitimate family in the big city.

title: Trishul
subTitle: Born out of wedlock, Vijay grows up with deep resentment towards his biological father Raj, a wealthy industrialist who has been leading a comfortable life with his legitimate family in the big city.

title: Suhaag
subTitle: Twins Amit and Kishan are separated at birth. However, when their paths cross in the future, together they work their way through and strive to overcome challenges.

title: Ghar Ek Mandir
subTitle: Brothers Prem, Vijay and Ravi are happy, but their lives change when Prem gets killed. Ravi must save his family from an evil man, Dharampal, while Vijay is preoccupied with Sapna.

title: Saajan Ki Saheli
subTitle: Kunti abandons her baby in order to lead a lavish life and marries a rich man. Years later, she realises that her husband is indulging in an affair and is shocked to find out the truth about the girl.

title: Sanam Bewafa
subTitle: Salman and Rukhsar's love brings two warring families face to face, only for tradition, dowry demands and heartbreak to test their fragile bond.

title: Ghulam-E-Musthafa
subTitle: A notorious hitman forsakes a life of crime after his lady love suffers a tragic death due to his professional rivalries. However, the mafia compels him to return for a final hit job.

title: Gair Kaanooni
subTitle: Police Inspector Kapil Khanna realises that his baby boy has been switched with a girl child by the hospital and files a lawsuit against the owner, Robert Decosta while trying to find his missing son.

title: Amrit
subTitle: A widowed man and woman face abuse from their respective children and seek comfort from each other instead.

title: Do Chor
subTitle: Tony, a burglar, comes under the radar of suspicion when a series of mysterious thefts bewilder the police. Soon enough, he tries to redeem his honour by going after the real criminal.

title: Champion
subTitle: Rajveer, a police officer, is tasked with protecting a nine-year-old heir, Abbas. However, the job gets complicated when Nazir, a dangerous criminal, seeks to harm the child.

title: Phullu
subTitle: Phullu's mother decides to marry him off to make him more mature. Things take an unexpected turn when he learns about menstruation after marriage.
